title: lycopodium selago var. typicum
intro: Lycopodium selago var. typicum, also known as Northern Club Moss, is a type of plant species belonging to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a spasmolytic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago var. typicum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, including tinctures and infusions, are typically used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
